description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a bold red exterior and a minimalist design. The sofa features a wide, flat seat and backrest, both of which are divided into two equal sections, giving it a symmetrical appearance. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend the full depth of the sofa, providing a sense of enclosure and support. The legs are short and blocky, positioned at the corners, and are integrated into the overall geometric form. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, matte material, likely synthetic leather or vinyl, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. The overall construction suggests a sturdy frame, likely wood or metal, with ample cushioning for comfort.
description: A bold red, boxy sofa with straight armrests, divided seat and back cushions, and a smooth matte finish. The design is modern and minimalist, with short block legs and no visible decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the divided seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical, boxy form.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat, with the block leg visible at the front corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the straight armrest, deep seat, and block leg at the front corner.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and flush with each other, forming a continuous seating and backrest surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and extending the full depth of the sofa, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at each corner, integrated into the sofa's base and finished in the same red material as the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest divided into two equal sections, with no tufting or decorative features, and attached directly to the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
